summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PostgreSQL migration. Backend health confirms PostgreSQL status ✅, but database connectivity issues prevent full feature testing. Frontend UI components working correctly ✅, but backend APIs returning 500 errors ❌.

critical_bugs.issue: PostgreSQL prepared statement errors with Supabase pgbouncer - 'prepared statement already exists' causing 500 errors
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all student data loading, skill graph access, teacher dashboard, and practice functionality
critical_bugs.technical_details: asyncpg + pgbouncer compatibility issue. Supabase uses transaction-mode pooling which conflicts with prepared statements.

critical_bugs.issue: Database seeding fails with 500 error due to same connectivity issue

working_endpoints.status: ✅ WORKING - Returns 200 with database: PostgreSQL confirmation
working_endpoints.verified: Health check correctly reports PostgreSQL migration status

working_endpoints.status: ✅ WORKING - Returns API info with PostgreSQL branding

integration_issues.issue: 500 errors from backend prevent student cards from displaying
Backend API failures result in empty dashboard with error toasts
Cannot test map/islands as no students available due to backend issues
Cannot test end-to-end as practice depends on student data and skill graph

passed_tests: ✅ API /api/health returns database: PostgreSQL status correctly
✅ Frontend loads without errors - student selector page renders
✅ Frontend navigation working - teacher dashboard accessible
✅ UI components styled correctly - shadcn components, gradients, layouts
✅ Button interactions functional - clicks and navigation work
✅ Error handling in frontend - shows user-friendly error messages
✅ Responsive design elements present - proper viewport handling
✅ Data-testid attributes present for automated testing

success_percentage.backend: 20% (2/10 endpoints working - health check ✅, main API ✅, all database endpoints ❌)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix PostgreSQL prepared statement compatibility with Supabase pgbouncer. This is blocking all database-dependent functionality. Recommended solutions: 1) Use psycopg instead of asyncpg, 2) Configure asyncpg with statement_cache_size=0, or 3) Switch to connection pooling mode in Supabase. Until this is resolved, cannot complete full feature testing of skill graph (43 nodes), teacher dashboard error patterns, or practice modal LLM integration.
